category_sources: source_facts.description says GraphicsMagick is an image processing tools collection; official site describes tools and libraries for reading, writing, and manipulating images.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is graphicsmagick and official homepage uses GraphicsMagick.
docs_sources: Official GraphicsMagick site publishes README, gm utility documentation, reference information, and FAQ pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GraphicsMagick site links its Mercurial repository at https://foss.heptapod.net/graphicsmagick/graphicsmagick and also notes SourceForge hg access.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GraphicsMagick homepage describe command-line utilities and libraries for image conversion, processing, and manipulation.
